pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to ensure the project compiles against the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 8, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if Java 17-specific APIs are used in the codebase.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the java.version property to 17 to align with the target JDK version for the project.
pom.xml.why_exists: Inconsistent version properties can lead to build failures or runtime errors if other plugins or scripts rely on this property to determine the Java version.
